section.para: nginx [engine x] is an HTTP and reverse proxy server, a mail proxy server, and a generic TCP/UDP proxy server, originally written by Igor Sysoev. The sources and documentation are distributed under the 2-clause BSD-like license. Commercial support is available from NGINX, Part of F5.
Linux Packages • Beginner's Guide • Code Repository • GitHub Mirror

project.title: njs
project.description: NGINX JavaScript (njs) extends nginx functionality with an ECMAScript-compatible interpreter for HTTP and Stream modules.

project.title: Unit
project.description: NGINX Unit is a lightweight application runtime that simplifies the application stack for running web apps and APIs.

project.title: Ingress
project.description: NGINX Ingress Controller connects Kubernetes apps and services with rock solid request handling, auth, self-service CRDs, and easy debugging.

project.title: Agent
project.description: NGINX Agent is a companion daemon for nginx that provides remote management and rich metrics.
